name: @aily-project/lib-unihiker-k10-sensor
author: DFRobot
description: UNIHIKER K10板载传感器库，支持加速度、光线/声音强度及AHT20温湿度检测
description_zh_cn: UNIHIKER K10板载传感器库，支持加速度、光线/声音强度及AHT20温湿度检测
description_en: UNIHIKER K10 onboard sensor library, supports accelerometer, light/sound intensity and AHT20 temperature & humidity
